# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "cosmosDbName": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2021-03-01",
      "name": "[parameters('functionAppName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', 'functionAppServicePlan')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2"
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2021-06-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "standard"
        },
        "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "version": "12.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('cosmosDbName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "kind": "GlobalDocumentDB",
      "properties": {
        "consistencyPolicy": {
          "defaultConsistencyLevel": "Session"
        },
        "locations": [
          {
            "locationName": "[resourceGroup().location]",
            "failoverPriority": 0
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/providers/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', guid(uniqueString(resourceId(''))))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b5f686ba-3b92-4f7d-b14c-a5b0a0e8bf2f')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-11-01').identity.principalId]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/providers/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', guid(uniqueString(resourceId(''))))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '8e06ec67-77ae-4e59-bfe2-7f1d3cb33c9a')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-11-01').identity.principalId]"
      }
    },

      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '00482a53-1e3b-419b-ae76-c6cf4fc533d9')]",

      }
    },
